raw_consumer_statement: We realized we didn't have our cards early XXXX, and I called to report them missing and fraudulent activity on XX/XX/XXXX. All of the charges happened on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$1500.00}. When I googled the store # associated with the charges they give stores in Oregon. My account balance should be {$0.00} as I had activated the cards but never used them. My wife was issued a new card ( the charges were on her card ), but merely froze mine. They also didn't report the charges as fraudulent ( {$1500.00} ) and was told today that I needed to make a minimum payment on XX/XX/XXXX. They haven't removed the charges, notes weren't properly made in their system, and they're trying to make me pay for it.
